base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_kraids_lair — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Kraid's Lair atlas — gray/blue metallic industrial stone, breakable blocks. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
